# Version 3.119.5 (Unreleased)
> **Servicing line head**

## Highlights

Head of the 3.119.x servicing line — one WinUI DLL-resolution fix has landed so far.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **WinUI projection now resolves on .NET 9** — SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI no longer fails with a DLL-not-found error for consumers targeting .NET 9. ([#4086](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4086))
